subcodes.title: Words to Ali Kuli Khan, spoken on 1906-06-09
subcodes.first_line: If a man is not happy in his life, death is better than such a life. True joy comes from the tranquility of [the] heart, and this state comes from faith!
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
